hotel_name: Sheraton Hà Nội West (Sheraton Hanoi West)

reviews.title: Good stay
reviews.text: Stay was comfortable. However the location is bit far from the airport and no much to do in the hotel for young children.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for sharing your feedback with us. We are glad to know that you had a comfortable stay.

We truly appreciate your comments regarding options for younger children, as it helps us identify areas where we can further enhance the family experience.

Thank you once again for your valuable comments. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back to Sheraton Hanoi West in the future and provide an even more enjoyable stay.

Warm regards,

Management Team
reviews.room_type: Deluxe King, Guest room, 1 King, City view

reviews.title: would not recommend
reviews.positives: N:a
reviews.negatives: Limited breakfast choice, facilities a bit old, understaff maybe dont feel staffs are friendly

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Had a problem during check, breakfast included as booked but hotel did not receive that information. Not flexible for late check out though many vacant apartments due to holidays, people going away

reviews.title: Employees clean and  save
reviews.positives: Jacuzzi sauna Gym for 24
reviews.negatives: The location is far from services and there are no bidets in the bathroom and and the price per night is high

reviews.title: Refunds are not allowed even immediately after.
reviews.text: I attempted to cancel my booking immediately after a one-click confirmation mistake through Agoda, but was told that only changes to the booking were possible, and my cancellation was not accepted. I negotiated with the hotel and Agoda for two hours, but they were adamant about the terms and showed no flexibility. I had expected hospitality from the brand, but I felt that the risk of a misoperation was very high. Those who use this service must exercise extreme caution. Previously, I had an upgrade at the Sheraton in Hawaii during my Diners Club Black Card days, but this time it was disappointing. I cannot comment on the facilities or other aspects, so that's just my imagination.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with us. We are truly sorry to learn about the frustration you encountered regarding your reservation made via Agoda, and we sincerely regret that this situation left you disappointed.

We fully understand how stressful it can be when a reservation is made by mistake, especially with one-click confirmation systems. While reservations made through third-party platforms such as Agoda are subject to the terms and conditions selected at the time of booking, we regret that we were unable to offer the flexibility you had hoped for on this occasion.

Please know that your feedback is important to us. We take your comments seriously and will share them with both our internal team and our partners to review how such situations may be handled more considerately in the future. We truly regret that this experience did not reflect the level of hospitality you expected from our brand.

We hope there may be an opportunity in t
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Twin, Guest room, 2 Twin, City view

reviews.title: Excellent stay.  Staff very attentive and friendly. Great for a longer work stay on the residence side,
reviews.positives: Location is great for my purpose. Beds are awesome and comfortable. Like access to the spa and gym.
reviews.negatives: Cost of food and drinks. No coffee machine in the rooms.  The kitchenettes are not super well equipped. Only one treadmill working well.  Others were sporadic.

reviews.title: The cleanliness and amenities of the Hanoi accommodation, along with the friendliness, are satisfactory.
reviews.text: The preparation of breakfast food was not adequate compared to the number of guests, and food was not replenished during the meal. Additionally, some food arrangements were distracting, so please consider this. For example, it would be helpful to group staple foods such as rice, porridge, and dumplings together for easier access, as well as to keep drinks like water, milk, and juice together. Please consider the overall flow of breakfast food.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback regarding your recent stay at Sheraton Hanoi West. We are delighted to hear that you were satisfied with the cleanliness, amenities, and the friendliness of our staff.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you experienced with our breakfast service. Your comments regarding the insufficient replenishment of food and the disorganized arrangement of certain items have been duly noted. We understand the importance of a well-organized and adequately stocked breakfast buffet to ensure a pleasant dining experience for our guests.

We appreciate your specific suggestions on grouping staple foods such as rice, porridge, and dumplings together for easier access, as well as arranging beverages like water, milk, and juices in a more cohesive manner. Rest assured, we will review the overall layout and flow of our breakfast offerings to enhance the convenience and satisfaction of our guests.

Thank you once again for yo

reviews.negatives: The location, is a bit far from anywhere (restaurants and places of interests)

reviews.text: The ceiling is leaking water, the air conditioning is too cold but cannot raise the temperature, even the hotel staff who came to check cannot adjust it.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Twin, Guest room, 2 Twin, City view

reviews.title: A good choice to stay away from the downtown
reviews.positives:
- Checkin and checkout procedures are easy and fast. Good breakfast with different choices. And I love the bathroom amenities and hot shower.
- Room is big and very clean.
- Location is far from the downtown but it seems to be convenient to get to the airport. There is a Korean town with many good cafes and restaurants within 10 minutes by car or public transport.
reviews.negatives: Nothing at all

reviews.title: I am satisfied.
reviews.text: It's easy to get to, and the location is really convenient. The staff are friendly, and the Korean food room service is great.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest, 

We would like to express our sincere gratitude for your valuable patronage and kind feedback. It is entirely our pleasure to have you here at Sheraton Hanoi West, and we will continue to strive for your utmost comfort and satisfaction in the future visit. 

Warmest regards,
Sheraton Hanoi West
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Twin, Guest room, 2 Twin, City view

reviews.title: Would rather stay leisurely in the hotel, specifically, at Regency Club Lounge for non-working days.
reviews.positives: Having breakfast always at Regency Club Lounge with excellent reception and heartly services over the 11 days of stay, leisurely with long duration of operation hours. Highly recommended for Club Access option.
reviews.negatives:
Less versatility of food options at Regency Lounge, especially on dinner occasions.
Fixed shower head over-hung right under the ceiling of shower room made it very inconvenient for shower experiences. 
Acoustic insulation could have been improved at the side of room entrance, specifically, the guestroom door.

reviews.title: Ok
reviews.text: Ok
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for your wonderful rating. We are delighted to know that you had a great experience with us.

We look forward to welcoming you back to Sheraton Hanoi West for another enjoyable stay.

Warm regards,
Sheraton Hanoi West

reviews.title: Wonderful staff who go out of their way to give you fabulous stay.
reviews.positives:
The staff were wonderful 
Rooms cleaned every day
Bathroom products of a good quality 
Three complimentary pieces of laundry a day is so welcome when you are staying for work
reviews.negatives: NA

reviews.title: Sheraton West is indeed great!!!
reviews.text: I am grateful to start my trip to Hanoi at the wonderful Sheraton Hanoi West. Despite the late check-in, the staff gave their best effort. Every breakfast was highly praised, and I received a small but heartfelt handwritten letter and a commemorative cake. The bedding provided in both nights helped me relieve my fatigue immediately. Thank you very much.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for your heartfelt feedback. We are truly honored to have been part of the beginning of your trip to Hanoi and delighted to hear that your stay at Sheraton Hanoi West was such a memorable experience.

It is especially rewarding to know that our team’s attentive care, even during your late check-in, helped make you feel warmly welcomed. We are also pleased that you enjoyed the breakfast offerings, the handwritten note, and the commemorative cake prepared for your stay.

Your kind words mean a great deal to us, and we look forward to welcoming you back to Sheraton Hanoi West for another comfortable and memorable stay in the future.

Warm regards,
Sheraton Hanoi West
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Twin, Guest room, 2 Twin, City view

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.positives: Front desk service was great
reviews.negatives: None

reviews.title: Hanoi trip
reviews.text: I stayed for 1 night and 2 days on a trip to the Hanoi area, and I felt that it was a 5-star hotel because of the friendly attitudes of the staff. However, during breakfast, there was no one making omelets, which is something you would expect to have a lot of when staying at a 5-star hotel. I believe it would be better to have someone make them on the spot rather than just serving a pre-made dish.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Sung

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We are pleased to hear that you enjoyed your stay and appreciated the friendliness of our team. We also value your constructive comment regarding the breakfast service. Please rest assured that your feedback will be shared with our culinary team as we continuously strive to improve our guest experience.

We look forward to welcoming you back to Sheraton Hanoi West in the future.

Best regards,
Sheraton Hanoi West
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Twin, Guest room, 2 Twin, City view

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.negatives: J'avais plus envie de partir 😁

reviews.title: Great option outside the bustle
reviews.text: This is a good option is you're looking for a hotel that has convenience to the airport. Very modern and clean rooms and great facilities. However, it is quite far from the Old Quarter.
reviews.response:
Dear Peter,

Thank you for sharing your feedback with us. We understand that our hotel’s location may feel less central when compared to the city center.

However, as our hotel is located near My Dinh National Stadium—an area that frequently hosts major events, festivals, and concerts—many guests appreciate having a peaceful and comfortable place to relax and unwind after a busy day. In addition, our location offers convenient access to and from Noi Bai International Airport.

Regardless of where the hotel is situated, we are always committed to ensuring that our location does not affect the quality of service or the overall guest experience. We sincerely hope to have the opportunity to welcome you again in the future and provide you with a more complete and enjoyable stay!

Warm regards,
Hotel Management Team

Warm regards,
Sheraton Hanoi West team.

reviews.title: Live performance participation
reviews.text: I stayed at this hotel, which is about a 10-minute walk from the stadium, to attend a live event held at the nearby stadium. The room was clean, and the hotel offered discounted lunch buffets for guests, which was a great deal.
reviews.response:
Dear Mika,

Thank you so much for choosing to stay at Sheraton Hanoi West during your live concert experience nearby! We're delighted to hear that you enjoyed the convenience of our location, the cleanliness of your room, and the special discount on our lunch buffet for in-house guests.

Your kind words truly encourage our team to continue delivering memorable experiences. We hope to welcome you back for another relaxing and enjoyable stay—whether it's for another concert or just a peaceful getaway.

Thank you for taking the time to give us your review. We are thrilled to hear that our service has become a regular part of your business trips. Your satisfaction is our top priority, and knowing that we are meeting your expectations is the best reward we could ask for. Sheraton Hanoi West is committed to providing you with the best possible experience every time you choose us for your travel needs. Your continued patronage is a vital part of our growth, and for that, we are most grateful. We look forward to serving you again on your next business trip. 

Best regards, 
Sheraton Hanoi West team.

reviews.title: A choice worth considering
reviews.text: The hotel is clean, the rooms are spacious and very comfortable. The staff is friendly and serves quickly. The location is convenient for traveling, close to many restaurants and attractions. Overall, the experience is very good, worth the money – will come back next time.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for your wonderful feedback. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed the cleanliness of the hotel, the spacious and comfortable room, and the convenient location during your stay.

It is especially rewarding to know that our friendly team and prompt service contributed positively to your experience.

Your kind words mean a great deal to us, and we are pleased to know that you found your stay worthwhile and plan to return. We look forward to welcoming you back to Sheraton Hanoi West soon for another memorable experience.

Warm regards,
Sheraton Hanoi West

We look forward to welcoming you back for another wonderful stay!

Stayed at Sheraton for business trip.

Comfortable  , pleasant, and not far from places I need to get to.

Dear Anthony,

Thank you for choosing Sheraton Hanoi West during your recent business trip and for sharing such wonderful feedback. We are delighted to know that you had a pleasant and comfortable stay, and that our convenient location, attentive service, and well-maintained facilities met your expectations.

Your kind words are truly motivating for our team as we continue striving to provide seamless experiences for all our guests. We look forward to welcoming you back on your next trip to Hanoi.

reviews.title: Tạm tạm.
reviews.positives: Thích sự phục vụ của bạn lễ tân Checkin phòng ốc, - Ms Linh rất hỗ trợ khách hàng. Khi tôi tới đã muộn, được bạn Linh hỗ trợ rất hài lòng.
reviews.negatives: Tôi đặt phòng là giường King - nhưng thực tế ko đạt yêu cầu. Đặt phòng ko cho lựa chọn đặt ăn sáng -  nên khi có nhu cầu dùng bữa sáng tại khách sạn vô cùng bất cập trong việc thanh toán, cho từng thành viên trong phòng, do thu ngân của quầy ăn sáng gây khó khăn.

reviews.title: Sheraton Hanoi West
reviews.text: I booked a room here to attend the Soobin Hoàng Sơn concert and I had an amazing 2-day experience.
reviews.response:
Thân chào Diệp,

Cảm ơn bạn đã lựa chọn Sheraton Hanoi West cho kỳ nghỉ trong dịp diễn ra concert Soobin Hoàng Sơn! Khách sạn rất vui khi các dịch vụ và không gian tại đây đã đáp ứng nhu cầu của bạn.

Sắp tới, Sheraton Hanoi West cũng đang triển khai gói ưu đãi “Home Sweet Home”, rất phù hợp cho sự kiện VPBank K-Star Spark 2025 diễn ra vào ngày 21/6 tại Sân vận động Mỹ Đình, chỉ cách khách sạn vài phút di chuyển. Rất mong được chào đón bạn và người thân quay trở lại trong dịp đặc biệt này!

Trân trọng,
Sheraton Hanoi West
reviews.room_type: Premier Twin, Guest room, 2 Twin, City view

reviews.title: Ưu điểm là gần khu giải trí Mỹ Đình.
reviews.positives: Gần sân vận động,nhà thi đấu phục vụ xem ca nhạc
reviews.negatives: Thiết kế nhà vệ sinh không có vòi xịt chỗ bồn cầu rất bất tiện mất vệ sinh. Khu tắm đứng thì lại chỉ có vòi tắm mưa ko có cây tắm gắn tường rất bất tiện.chỗ bồn tắm lẽ ra không cần vòi tắm cầm tay thì lại có. Rèm cuốn khu nhà vệ sinh lẽ ra lắp bên trong thì lại lắp bên ngoài, vẫn lộ khe hở thiếu kín đáo. Khu hành lang tầng thì không lắp điều hoà vừa hầm vừa bí.Khu lễ tân check in khách đến ko mời được 1 li nước lọc, khâu tiếp đón chưa tương xứng với cấp sao của khách sạn

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Beautiful room, polite staff, overall very good.
reviews.response:
Thân gửi chị Huyền,

Sheraton Hanoi West xin chân thành cảm ơn quý khách đã dành thời gian chia sẻ những trải nghiệm tích cực về kỳ nghỉ của mình.

Chúng tôi rất vui mừng khi được biết quý khách hài lòng về thiết kế phòng của chúng tôi. Đồng thời, những lời khen ngợi về thái độ phục vụ chuyên nghiệp của đội ngũ nhân viên là nguồn động viên to lớn để chúng tôi tiếp tục duy trì và nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ.

Rất mong được đón tiếp quý khách trong những lần ghé thăm tiếp theo.

Trân trọng,
Sheraton Hanoi West
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Twin, Guest room, 2 Twin, City view

Dear Theanh,

Thank you for sharing your delightful feedback about your recent stay at Sheraton Hanoi West. We are truly pleased that you enjoyed your time with us and that we were able to meet your stringent requirements.

We appreciate your enthusiasm for your next visit and are committed to ensuring that each stay is as memorable as the last. If there's anything we can do to make your future stays even more special, please don't hesitate to let us know.

Thank you again for choosing Sheraton Hanoi West.

Best regards,
Sheraton Hanoi West

reviews.title: 아 정말 다 좋은데 비데가 없어서  똥싸고 뒤처리가 힘들어 고생함
reviews.text: 아 객실 화장실 너무 불편함. 그 흔한 비데가 일단 없고 샤워실도 핸드샤워가 불가능한 고정 샤워기. 그리고 욕조는 드러갈때 자꾸 유리에 머라 벅치기 함. 유리가 안깨진게 다행이고 난 사우나시설을 주로 이용했는데 나쁘지 않았음. 호ㅓ장실에 비데가 없어서 아주 불편함. 저시 갈지는 모르겠름. 호치민에 비해 클럽라윤지 음식이 좀 샤운했음.  일단 수동비데를 갖추던지 자동비데를 갖추던지 비데다 필요함.  직원둘은 친절해서 나올때 얼마안되지만 팁을 주긴 했음.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We are truly sorry to hear about your recent experience and sincerely regret that it did not meet your expectations.

We deeply apologize for the inconvenience caused during what must have already been a difficult situation. Your feedback has been shared with the relevant team for immediate review and improvement. We truly value your feedback and would appreciate the opportunity to restore your confidence in us. 

Should you be willing, please contact us directly so we may better understand the situation and assist you further.
Thank you again for bringing this to our attention.

Warm regards,
Sheraton Hanoi West

직원분의 빠른 일처리로 너무 좋았습니다.

Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for your wonderful feedback. We are delighted to hear that your family trip with six guests ended on such a positive note at Sheraton Hanoi West.

It is especially rewarding to know that our team’s quick and efficient service contributed to making your stay more comfortable and enjoyable.

Your kind words mean a great deal to us, and we look forward to welcoming you and your family back to Sheraton Hanoi West soon for another memorable stay.

Warm regards,
Sheraton Hanoi West

reviews.text: 조식이 너무 훌륭합니다
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for your wonderful feedback regarding your recent stay at Sheraton Hanoi West. We are delighted to hear that you had an excellent experience and that you found our breakfast offerings to be exceptional.

Your kind words are greatly appreciated and will be shared with our team to recognize their dedication to providing outstanding service. We strive to ensure that every guest has a memorable and enjoyable stay, and it is gratifying to know that we succeeded in your case.

We look forward to welcoming you back to Sheraton Hanoi West in the near future. Should you have any further comments or require assistance, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Warm regards,
Sheraton Hanoi West team.

reviews.title: Ok
reviews.text: Xa trung tâm
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách,

Cảm ơn Quý khách đã chia sẻ những phản hồi của mình. Chúng tôi hiểu rằng vị trí của khách sạn có thể chưa thực sự gần khi so sánh với khu vực trung tâm thành phố.

Tuy nhiên, do khách sạn tọa lạc gần Sân vận động Quốc gia Mỹ Đình – nơi thường xuyên diễn ra các sự kiện, lễ hội, concert lớn nên nhiều Quý khách đánh giá cao việc có một không gian lưu trú yên tĩnh, thoải mái để nghỉ ngơi và thư giãn sau một ngày tấp nập. Bên cạnh đó, vị trí của khách sạn cũng thuận tiện cho việc di chuyển đến và đi từ Sân bay Quốc tế Nội Bài.

Dù khách sạn tọa lạc ở bất kỳ vị trí nào, chúng tôi luôn cam kết không để điều đó ảnh hưởng đến chất lượng dịch vụ và trải nghiệm lưu trú của Quý khách. Chúng tôi hy vọng sẽ có cơ hội được đón tiếp Quý khách trong tương lai và mang đến một kỳ nghỉ trọn vẹn hơn!

Trân trọng,
Ban Quản Lý Khách Sạn
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Twin, Guest room, 2 Twin, City view

reviews.title: I did not sleep well - it’s not value for money.
reviews.positives: Clean
reviews.negatives: Can’t sleep as the room 1821 was talking all night, I can listen then talking and talking. We were given connected room. So the sound is coming from the connected door. There were chienese couple - oh my god, I hardly get a good night sleep. Future kindly do not take the connected room as it’s not sound proof.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Vị trí đẹp, sạch sẽ.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách,

Chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã chia sẻ những phản hồi tích cực. Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết rằng Quý khách hài lòng với vị trí của khách sạn cũng như sự sạch sẽ trong suốt thời gian lưu trú.

Rất mong được chào đón Quý khách quay trở lại trong những dịp sắp tới.

Trân trọng,
Sheraton Hanoi West
reviews.room_type: Two-Bedroom Suite

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.negatives:
everything was decent but first time i had experienced loss of property in the room. left my bluetooth ear piece in the room. after investigation hotel deem that their staff did not take it, while i did not bring it out of the hotel room for the entire trip.
in the end the item was not found and the hotel only offered to assist if i wanted to make police report which i didnt want as the item was not too expensive to warrant it.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Đẹp sạch sẽ gọn
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Warm greetings from Sheraton Hanoi West.

Thank you very much for your kind feedback. We are pleased to know that you found the hotel beautiful, clean, and tidy during your stay.

We truly appreciate your support and look forward to welcoming you back again in the future.

Warm regards,
Sheraton Hanoi West
reviews.room_type: Deluxe King, Guest room, 1 King, City view

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Room was clean and comfortable
reviews.negatives: Location is far from tourist attractions and city centre. There were chocolates inside the room but card was written by hotel staff for another guest name (maybe guest who stayed in the room before us). Staff could be more careful

reviews.title: excellent food and service
reviews.text: coz i come  for tournament, Sheraton is few minute walk to the venue.  besides a supermarket nearby, there is nothing special around. i almost had all my meals there, buffet breakfast  included in rates, buffet dinner (HK$150), room service, lounge cafe. All is very good, highly recommend.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for sharing your feedback regarding your recent stay at Sheraton Hanoi West. We are delighted to hear that our convenient location near your tournament venue made your trip more comfortable and enjoyable.

It is especially rewarding to know that you enjoyed the dining experiences throughout your stay, including the buffet breakfast, buffet dinner, room service, and lounge café offerings. Your kind recommendation means a great deal to us.

We truly appreciate your support and look forward to welcoming you back to Sheraton Hanoi West for another pleasant and memorable stay in the future.

Warm regards,
Sheraton Hanoi West
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Twin, Guest room, 2 Twin, City view

reviews.title: Need to improve the food offering and quality.
reviews.negatives: The food from the restaurant is poorly prepared. Bad taste. such as the Japanese curry rice and western food burger

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Over all it was a good high end hotel
reviews.negatives: The shower and bathroom facilities were and issue - we has to ask a plumber to fix the bath and the shower head was low quality.

reviews.title: Enjoyed the stay with good food (inroom dining was great) but too chaotic
reviews.positives: Really near MyDinh stadium, great for when you need to attend events there as its about 10mins walk
reviews.negatives: Soundproofing is the problem. I could hear all kinda of noises from the surrounding, from the adjacent rooms or even vacuuming sound in the lobby at 7am. Not what I expected for this roomrate. Also I stayed several days for Anhtraisayhi concert without prior knowledge about the artists staying there too, and it was chaotic. Seeming little to none security in the lobby so no privacy for guests, as the fans were free to camp there all days. Couldve done better on security front.

reviews.title: Comfortable stay
reviews.positives: The location to the stadium and the staff at the lounge were amazing. Blackpink theme for the occasion!!!
reviews.negatives: I found stains on face towels and the food I paid for at level 1 restaurant was not good.

reviews.title: Perfect and relaxing stay
reviews.positives: Lovely hotel located in one of good areas of Hanoi. Friendly and polite staff ready any time to help. My family and I really enjoyed staying there. Highly recommended hotel.
reviews.negatives: No negative point, all good.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Spacious clean suite. Various breakfast choices
reviews.negatives: Needed a bigger mirror. No window.

reviews.title: Good place to stay, chaffier to and from the airport was great.
reviews.positives: Breakfast was good and in a good location, plenty of variety some of the food had gone a bit cold though.
reviews.negatives: Bed was a bit hard and the bathroom could have been a bit cleaner.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Extensive daily breakfast buffet options 
Room size and amenities
Executive Lounge access
Bath tub in Master Bathroom
reviews.negatives: No bidet in toilet 😕

reviews.title: highly recommend！
reviews.positives: I had a wonderful stay at this hotel. The entire place was clean and well-maintained, creating a very comfortable atmosphere. A special thanks to Janny at the front desk—she welcomed me with the warmth and kindness of an old friend, which made my experience even more special. The room was spotless, and the daily housekeeping was excellent. The breakfast buffet was also a highlight, with a great variety of delicious options to start the day right. Highly recommended!
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: really enjoyed it
reviews.positives: it was cool
reviews.negatives: The Room Prices are quite high

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great breakfast

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Overall was a greater experience staying at Sheraton West. Breakfast was diverse and plenty options. Staff was happy and positive in every aspect. Management was on point. Especially want to mention the bartender Son which was the nicest guy in our stay.
reviews.negatives: The spa wasn’t as clean as expected.
